Romanization

naa naa naa naa
neoeo neoeo neoeo neoeo

yeoreumnal nuni wado singgihaji aneul geoya
nega yeope inneun geopboda

if i ain’t got you
maldo an dwae Like black swan (Black swan)
deudieo chajeun naui Parachute (Parachute)

Yeah, all I need is you
All I wanna do

buri buteo tteugeowojyeo, We on fire
